documentation.value:
Global options appear at the top of the Caddyfile before any site blocks.

```caddyfile
{
    email admin@example.com
    acme_ca https://acme-staging-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory
}
```

Proxy requests to one or more backend servers.

```caddyfile
reverse_proxy localhost:3000
```

Configure active health checking for backends.

```caddyfile
reverse_proxy localhost:3001 localhost:3002 {
    health_uri /health
    health_interval 10s
    health_timeout 5s
}
```

Add circuit breaker to upstream.

```caddyfile
reverse_proxy localhost:3000 {
    cb_type count
    cb_threshold 5
    cb_timeout 30s
}
```

Serve static files from the site root.

```caddyfile
file_server
```

Enable directory listing.

```caddyfile
file_server browse
```

Serve files from a specific directory.

```caddyfile
root * /var/www/html
file_server
```

Return a static response to the client.

```caddyfile
respond "Hello, World!" 200
```

Internally rewrite the request URI.

```caddyfile
rewrite * /index.html
```

Strip a path prefix from the URI.

```caddyfile
uri strip_prefix /api
```

Strip a path suffix from the URI.

```caddyfile
uri strip_suffix .html
```

Send an HTTP redirect to the client.

```caddyfile
redir /old /new permanent
```

Permanent 301 redirect.

```caddyfile
redir /old-page /new-page permanent
```

Temporary 302 redirect.

```caddyfile
redir /old-page /new-page temporary
```

Redirect using request placeholders.

```caddyfile
redir https://www.{host}{uri} permanent
```

Set the root directory for file operations.

```caddyfile
root * /var/www/html
```

Rewrite to the first file that exists.

```caddyfile
try_files {path} /index.html
```

Single Page Application fallback.

```caddyfile
try_files {path} {path}/ /index.html
```

Standard PHP try_files with index.php fallback.

```caddyfile
try_files {path} {path}/ /index.php?{query}
```

Enable response compression.

```caddyfile
encode gzip zstd
```

Enable gzip compression.

```caddyfile
encode gzip
```

Enable Zstandard compression.

```caddyfile
encode zstd
```

Set, add, or remove response headers.

```caddyfile
header X-Frame-Options DENY
```

Set a header value.

```caddyfile
header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff
```

Add a header (allows multiple values).

```caddyfile
header +Link "</style.css>; rel=preload"
```

Remove a response header.

```caddyfile
header -Server
```

Apply header changes after the response is written by other handlers.

```caddyfile
header {
    defer
    -Server
    +X-Powered-By "Caddy"
}
```

Configure TLS/HTTPS settings.

```caddyfile
tls admin@example.com
```

Use Caddy's internal self-signed certificate.

```caddyfile
tls internal
```

Execute directives in the exact order listed (no automatic reordering).

```caddyfile
route {
    rewrite /old /new
    reverse_proxy localhost:3000
}
```

Include a snippet or file.

```caddyfile
import common_headers
```

Include an external Caddyfile or snippet.

```caddyfile
import /etc/caddy/sites/*.caddy
```

Define a snippet that can be imported.

```caddyfile
(common_headers) {
    header X-Frame-Options DENY
    header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff
}
```

Enable server-side template evaluation.

```caddyfile
templates
```

Shortcut for PHP-FPM reverse proxying.

```caddyfile
php_fastcgi localhost:9000
```

PHP FastCGI with a custom document root.

```caddyfile
root * /var/www/html
php_fastcgi localhost:9000
```

Immediately abort the connection with no response.

```caddyfile
abort
```

Trigger an HTTP error.

```caddyfile
error /secret/* "Access denied" 403
```

Manipulate the request URI.

```caddyfile
uri strip_prefix /api
```

Strip a path prefix.

```caddyfile
uri strip_prefix /api
```

Strip a path suffix.

```caddyfile
uri strip_suffix .html
```

Replace part of the URI.

```caddyfile
uri replace /old /new
```

Regex-based URI path rewriting.

```caddyfile
uri path_regexp /user/(\d+) /profile?id=$1
```

Map an input value to one or more output variables.

```caddyfile
map {host} {my_var} {
    example.com "value1"
    default     "fallback"
}
```

Bind the listener to a specific interface address.

```caddyfile
bind 127.0.0.1
```

Enable Prometheus metrics endpoint.

```caddyfile
metrics /metrics
```

Serve ACME certificates (built-in CA).

```caddyfile
acme_server
```

Match requests by URI path.

```caddyfile
@api path /api/*
```

Match requests by hostname.

```caddyfile
@example host example.com
```

Match requests by HTTP method.

```caddyfile
@post method POST
```

Match requests by header value.

```caddyfile
@websocket header Connection *Upgrade*
```

Match requests by query string parameter.

```caddyfile
@debug query debug=true
```

Match requests by client IP address.

```caddyfile
@local remote_ip 192.168.0.0/16
```

Match requests by protocol (http or https).

```caddyfile
@secure protocol https
```

Match using a CEL expression.

```caddyfile
@mobile expression {http.request.header.User-Agent}.contains("Mobile")
```

Negate another matcher.

```caddyfile
@notAPI not path /api/*
```

A full static file server configuration.

```caddyfile
example.com {
    root * /var/www/html
    encode gzip zstd
    file_server
}
```

completions.label: template: SPA reverse proxy

documentation.value:
Full WordPress site with PHP-FPM.

```caddyfile
example.com {
    root * /var/www/wordpress
    encode gzip
    php_fastcgi unix//run/php/php-fpm.sock
    file_server
}
```

completions.label: template: API gateway
template: WebSocket proxy

documentation.value:
The full request URI path and query string.

```caddyfile
rewrite * {http.request.uri}
```

The hostname from the request.

```caddyfile
header X-Forwarded-Host {http.request.host}
```

The HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.).

```caddyfile
@post expression {http.request.method} == "POST"
```

Access any request header by name.

```caddyfile
header_up X-Original-Host {http.request.header.Host}
```

Access any response header by name.

```caddyfile
header X-Response-Time {http.response.header.X-Response-Time}
```

Shorthand for `{http.request.host}`.

```caddyfile
redir https://{host}{uri}
```

Shorthand for `{http.request.uri}`.

```caddyfile
try_files {path} {uri} /index.html
```

The URI path (without query string).

```caddyfile
try_files {path} /index.html
```

The raw query string.

```caddyfile
rewrite * /index.php?{query}
```

Shorthand for `{http.request.method}`.

```caddyfile
@post expression {method} == "POST"
```

Shorthand for `{http.request.remote.host}`.

```caddyfile
header_up X-Real-IP {remote_host}
```

Delegates authentication to an external service via subrequest.

```caddyfile
forward_auth localhost:9000 {
    uri /auth
    copy_headers X-User X-Email
}
```

completions.label: forward_auth with headers

documentation.value:
Manipulate request headers before proxying.

```caddyfile
request_header X-Real-IP {remote_host}
request_header -Server
```

Configure HTTP/2 server push.

```caddyfile
push /style.css /script.js
```

Copy the entire response from a handled request (used in handle_errors or intercept).

```caddyfile
copy_response
# or with specific status:
copy_response 404
```

Override the HTTP method of the request.

```caddyfile
method GET
```

completions.label: template: security headers

documentation.value:
Add common security headers.

```caddyfile
header {
    X-Content-Type-Options nosniff
    X-Frame-Options DENY
    Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin
    X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block"
    -Server
}
```

completions.label: template: CORS
log to file

documentation.value:
TLS-related request placeholders.

- `{http.request.tls.version}` â€” TLS version (e.g., 1.3)
- `{http.request.tls.cipher_suite}` â€” cipher suite
- `{http.request.tls.server_name}` â€” SNI server name

Access a specific cookie value.

```
{http.request.cookie.session_id}
```

Placeholders from reverse_proxy.

- `{http.reverse_proxy.upstream.hostport}` â€” selected upstream address
- `{http.reverse_proxy.upstream.host}` â€” upstream host
- `{http.reverse_proxy.upstream.port}` â€” upstream port
- `{http.reverse_proxy.upstream.latency}` â€” response time
- `{http.reverse_proxy.header.*}` â€” upstream response headers
